name: irene
description: Interact with the TGCC Irene supercomputer: submit and monitor Bridge/Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in TGCC Irene guide.

interface.shortDescription: Submit and monitor TGCC Irene jobs and search Irene docs.
interface.longDescription: Interact with the TGCC Irene supercomputer from Codex: submit and monitor Bridge/Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in Irene guide.
defaultPrompt: Submit a small Irene test job.
